title: Cross-disciplinary evolution of the genomics revolution.
author: Petersen AM Majeti D Kwon K Ahmed ME Pavlidis I
content: S-EPMC6093681 PMC6093681 Cross-disciplinary evolution of the genomics revolution. Born out of the Human Genome Project (HGP), the field of genomics evolved with phenomenal speed into a dominant scientific and business force.
